# CWE-420: debug and primary channels share the same auth middleware.
lang: go
file: CWE-420-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func RegisterBillingRoutes(r *gin.Engine, db *gorm.DB) {
	api := r.Group("/api", requireJWT())
	api.GET("/invoices", func(c *gin.Context) {
		var rows []map[string]interface{}
		db.Raw("SELECT id, total FROM invoices WHERE tenant_id = ?", c.GetString("tenant")).Scan(&rows)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, rows)
	})
	api.GET("/debug/sqltrace", func(c *gin.Context) {
		db.Exec("PRAGMA query_only = 1")
		c.String(http.StatusOK, "trace enabled for %s", c.GetString("tenant"))
	})
}

func requireJWT() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) { c.Next() }
}
